mapper.select: select id as id, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, owner_id as ownerId, owner_name as ownerName, owner_phone as ownerPhone, owner_address as ownerAddress, owner_is_temp as ownerIsTemp, name as name, avatar as avatar, type as type, species as species, breed as breed, gender as gender, gender_code as genderCode, birthday as birthday, age as age, weight as weight, color as color, chip_number as chipNumber, neutered as neutered, health_status as healthStatus, status as status, vaccines as vaccines, allergies as allergies, allergy as allergy, allergy_history as allergyHistory, description as description, remark as remark, last_visit as lastVisit, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from pet where id = #{id}

select id as id, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, owner_id as ownerId, owner_name as ownerName, owner_phone as ownerPhone, owner_address as ownerAddress, owner_is_temp as ownerIsTemp, name as name, avatar as avatar, type as type, species as species, breed as breed, gender as gender, gender_code as genderCode, birthday as birthday, age as age, weight as weight, color as color, chip_number as chipNumber, neutered as neutered, health_status as healthStatus, status as status, vaccines as vaccines, allergies as allergies, allergy as allergy, allergy_history as allergyHistory, description as description, remark as remark, last_visit as lastVisit, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from pet order by id desc

select id, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, owner_user_id as ownerId, owner_name as ownerName, owner_phone as ownerPhone, name, species, gender, age, allergy_history as allergyHistory, '' as healthRecords, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime from pet where is_deleted = 0 and (owner_user_id = #{ownerId} or owner_id = #{ownerId}) order by id desc
